# Women's Health Fundraising Tracker

> A private, local-first command center for femtech founders raising capital. Track investors, conversations, and follow-ups in your browser — no accounts, no backend.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Pipeline tracker for femtech founders, with kanban and table views, curated investor list, and women's health news sources.

## Optional

- [The Faulkner Group Advisors](https://thefaulknergroupadvisors.com/): Publisher of the tracker.
